description.content: Operations for managing time entries and timers within a ClickUp Workspace.

item.name: Get time entries within a date range

request.name: Get time entries within a date range

description.content: Retrieves time entries within a specified date range for a Workspace. Results can be filtered by assignees and task IDs. Returns time entries with their duration, start time, end time, and associated task information.

query.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the start of the date range.
Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the end of the date range.
Comma-separated list of user IDs to filter by assignees.
Include tags from the associated tasks.
Include names of the spaces, folders, and lists.
If true, the task_id parameter should be a custom task ID.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).
(Required) The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Workspace (team).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a manual time entry for a task in a Workspace. The time entry requires a start timestamp and duration. Optionally, a description, tags, and billable status can be included.

query.description: If true, the tid parameter should be a custom task ID.

The ClickUp Time Tracking API provides endpoints for recording and retrieving time entries associated with tasks. Developers can create manual time entries, start and stop timers, and query time entries within date ranges and across team members. This API supports building time reporting dashboards, invoicing integrations, and productivity analysis tools.
